{{Quote|I lied to Flatt. I was responsible for putting him in that jail. Past demons coming back to haunt me.|[[Brenn Tantor]] to [[Tyr Taskeen]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
'''Hamman Flatt''' was a [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the leader of the [[Abridon Nationalists]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
When the Nationalists, with the help of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces, [[Uprising on Abridon|captured]] Abridon in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it took the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] only three days to rush in forces and [[Massacre on Abridon|reclaim]] it. When [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]]'s [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] captured the [[Abridon Government Center]], [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|Lieutenant Governor]] Hamman Flatt was the most senior rebel taken into custody.

Terrified, Flatt attempted to bargain for his life. Tantor, uninterested, dismissed him until Flatt blurted out vital information: five Rebel dignitaries were in the [[Abridon capital city|capital city]], attempting to sway the Nationalists into joining the Rebel Alliance. Maintaining some loyalty to the cause, Flatt neglected to mention that one of these Rebels was [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] hero [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. At that point, Tantor's superior stepped in. [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] dispatched [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] to confirm Flatt's report and promised that, if true, Flatt's information had bought him a swift, rather than prolonged and painful, death.

Flatt was incarcerated in a [[Abridon holding camp|prison camp]] on the eastern edge of the [[Abridon capital city|capital]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was rescued by two Rebel generals during their [[Liberation of Abridon|conquest]] of Abridon. One, [[Tyr Taskeen]], had commanded the Rebel forces on Abridon before being driven off in the recapture of the planet. The other struck Flatt as vaguely familiar, but denied having ever met him. Flatt happily offered the planet, as well as a valuable shipment of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]], to the Rebels in exchange for removing Imperial forces from Abridon's embattled industrial center, [[Sayan]]. Flatt's conditions were swiftly satisfied by Taskeen and his newly defected subordinate, General Brenn Tantor.

==Behind the scenes==
Hamman Flatt was voiced by [[Ethan Phillips]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
